name: 甜蜜炸彈型（求婚結尾）
description: 以全劇最甜的求婚作為結尾——Ryan交出所有證件說「我也是你的」並求婚，Andrea說「還沒畢業」，Ryan回「可以加學分」，用幽默化解嚴肅，讓觀眾帶著甜蜜和滿足感離開。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: I'm giving them all to you. / All to me? What about you then? / Well, I'm also yours. / Andrea, let's get married. / We haven't even graduated yet. / It's fine. We can get extra credits anyway. / Sweetheart, happy married life. / Honey. Happy married life.
